summary: All 7 criteria independently verified against git show b9c936c with full re-runs. nonGoals explicitly checked: loop never throws BudgetExceededError, own bober.config.json byte-unchanged, effort never on OpenAI wire, ceiling fires only at turn boundaries. All four loop return sites use conditional costUsd spreads. Iteration-1 pass.
